name: @pratikpsl/agent-skills-dotnet
description: AI agent skill definitions for .NET/C# projects (CQRS, MediatR, EF Core, xUnit, ASP.NET Core).

skills.name: OPERATING
skills.description: Shared operating contract: bootstrap sequence, working rules, completion gate for all agents.

skills.name: core
skills.description: Load on every task. Core principles: think before coding, surgical changes, goal-driven testing.

skills.name: code-standards
skills.description: C# coding standards: naming, no magic values, DRY, readability rules.

skills.name: design
skills.description: SOLID, KISS, YAGNI, and design pattern rules for .NET architecture.

skills.name: dotnet-best-practices
skills.description: General .NET and EF Core best practices: async, cancellation, no N+1, projection.

skills.name: csharp-xunit
skills.description: xUnit unit testing guidelines including data-driven tests and mocking patterns.

skills.name: mcp_dotnet
skills.description: Model Context Protocol tool rules for building and reviewing .NET MCP server tools.

skills.name: dotnet-api
skills.description: RESTful API structure, pipeline, OpenAPI, CORS, auth, versioning for .NET 10 Web API.

skills.name: harness
skills.description: Guide and sensor setup for agent operations, CI hooks, and validation scripts.

skills.name: agents
skills.description: Agent persona definitions: architect (design/CQRS) and developer (.NET C# implementation).

skills.name: memory
skills.description: Persistent agent memory: domain lesson files and memory schema for learning loops.

skills.name: entry-point:claude
skills.description: Lightweight Claude entry point — routes the agent to AgentSkills/OPERATING.md.

skills.name: entry-point:codex
skills.description: Lightweight Codex/OpenAI entry point — routes the agent to AgentSkills/OPERATING.md.

skills.name: entry-point:copilot
skills.description: Lightweight GitHub Copilot entry point — routes the agent to AgentSkills/OPERATING.md.

skills.name: entry-point:cursor
skills.description: Lightweight Cursor/Antigravity entry point — routes the agent to AgentSkills/OPERATING.md.
